description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a deep red exterior and metallic silver top. The front features a large, flowing script reading 'Cidade Arts City' in white, with a stylized wave design and the word 'NATAL' vertically aligned. The back and side panels display a nutrition facts label, barcode, and recycling symbols in white, contrasting against the dark red background. The can has a standard pull-tab opening mechanism on top, typical of beverage cans. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and there are no visible dents or scratches. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and typical of a carbonated soft drink or energy drink container.
description: A tall, glossy red aluminum can with white branding and a silver pull-tab top, featuring nutrition facts and a barcode on the back.
description_view_0: The can's side is visible with part of the nutrition facts label, recycling symbols, and a glimpse of the pull-tab top.
description_view_1: This view shows the nutrition facts label and barcode in detail, with the can's curvature and metallic top also visible.
description_view_2: The can's plain red side is shown, with minimal visible text or graphics, and the metallic top is prominent.
description_view_3: The front of the can displays the large 'Cidade Arts City' script and wave design, with the word 'NATAL' vertically aligned.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white script 'Cidade Arts City' with a wave design and 'NATAL' vertically aligned; nutrition facts, barcode, and recycling symbols in white on the back.
